author.bio: M.S. CompSci. @caddyserver & @relicabackup. Member of the restored Church of Jesus Christ. Downvoted for opinions. Comes in second place, every time.
author.name: 🧗‍♂️ Matt Holt

content.text:
For example: How HTTP routes get declared and transformed into a structure via the Caddyfile is an interesting study combining all these theories!

I've done a lot of work to find an optimal design for the v2 Caddyfile that maximizes expressiveness and minimizes complexity.
